summary: T-Mobile subscriber FGotD archive - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN a user is a T-Mobile subscriber
AND there is an archived FGotD
AND the user is not in the viewing market of the game

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archived FGotD game tile
steps.result:
THEN buttons for Recap and Condensed Game display center justified, above the team feeds
AND the user will see feed buttons for both teams
AND the user achieves playback after selecting each button
